# CUDA-Q Academic

> Live site for CUDA-Q Academic learning paths and browser-based visualization widgets.

This branch serves the deployed CUDA-Q Academic website. The authoritative machine-readable curriculum catalog is maintained in the `main` branch at [curriculum.json](https://github.com/NVIDIA/cuda-q-academic/blob/main/curriculum.json).

Use `curriculum.json` as the source of truth for:

- learning-path and track inventory
- lesson titles, prerequisites, difficulty, keywords, and summaries
- shared-lesson membership across tracks
- live widget inventory and widget metadata

Use this deployed branch for the public URLs that learners and agents should open in a browser.

## Core Resources

- [curriculum.json (main branch)](https://github.com/NVIDIA/cuda-q-academic/blob/main/curriculum.json): canonical machine-readable catalog for tracks, lessons, and widgets
- [Learning Paths](https://nvidia.github.io/cuda-q-academic/learningpath.html): live entry point for the nine curriculum tracks
- [Visualization Gallery](https://nvidia.github.io/cuda-q-academic/visualization-gallery.html): live widget gallery
- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/NVIDIA/cuda-q-academic): canonical source repository
- [README](https://github.com/NVIDIA/cuda-q-academic/blob/main/README.md): human overview of the curriculum

## How To Navigate

- Start with [curriculum.json](https://github.com/NVIDIA/cuda-q-academic/blob/main/curriculum.json) to discover tracks, lessons, prerequisites, difficulty, summaries, and widgets.
- Use `tracks[*].learning_path_url` from the catalog to deep-link learners to the live Learning Paths page.
- Use `widgets[*].live_url` from the catalog to deep-link learners to live browser widgets on this deployed site.
- Use `lessons[*].link` from the catalog for notebook-level lesson links in the main repository.
- Treat this deployed branch as the runtime surface for hosted HTML pages, not as the authoritative metadata catalog.

## Optional

- [Widget source branch](https://github.com/NVIDIA/cuda-q-academic/tree/widgets-as-html): deployed-site source files
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/NVIDIA/cuda-q-academic/blob/main/AGENTS.md): maintainer instructions for coding agents working in the repository
